title: Evergreen India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Evergreen India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Warehouse Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!
